# GISELLO

> AI navigators for cross-border medical care. GISELLO coordinates fertility and aesthetic treatment across borders, combining AI for cognition with a Patient Navigator for judgement.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of the GISELLO system: Vault, Brief, Match, and the Patient Navigator.
- [How it works](/how-it-works): The four phases of a coordinated cross-border treatment journey.
- [Patient Vault](/patient-vault): How the medical record vault works for patients and clinics.
- [Pilot](/pilot): Founder-led 2026 pilot cohort details and eligibility.
- [Pricing](/pricing): Pricing for the pilot and ongoing service.
- [Founder](/founder): Founder letter and the origin of GISELLO.
- [About](/about): Mission, background, and the team behind GISELLO.
- [Writing](/writing): Field notes and essays on cross-border care.
- [What's next](/whats-next): Roadmap and upcoming releases.
- [Book a call](/book-call): Schedule an intake call with a Patient Navigator.
- [Press](/press): Press and PR enquiries.
- [Compliance](/compliance): Regulatory, data, and clinical compliance posture.

## Optional

- [Terms](/terms): Terms and conditions.
